protocol_notes: Commenter references clinical trial dosing schedules: starting at 0.5mg week 1, increasing to 1mg week 2, then adding 1mg/week. Maintenance dose in trials is max 12mg/week. Some users dose once weekly, others split dose twice weekly. Recommended 10mg vial reconstituted with 1ml bacteriostatic water yields 1mg = 1000mcg = 10 units on 1ml syringe.
